news.title:
Praj Industries to participate in 11th Annual Valorem Conference on 23rd March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be discussed during the interactions.
news.summary:
Praj Industries to participate in 11th Annual Valorem Conference on 23rd March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be discussed during the interactions.

news.title:
India's ethanol push saves Rs 1.4L crore in crude imports, aiding Praj, Balrampur, Triveni.
Praj leads in bio-energy tech; Balrampur, Triveni benefit from sugar-ethanol integration amid policy challenges.
news.summary:
India's ethanol push saves Rs 1.4L crore in crude imports, aiding Praj, Balrampur, Triveni.
Praj leads in bio-energy tech; Balrampur, Triveni benefit from sugar-ethanol integration amid policy challenges.

news.title:
Praj Industries' FY25 ROCE at 23%; 1,000 plants globally, presence in 100 countries.
Q3 FY26 order intake reached INR 9,140 Mn; total order book at INR 44,910 Mn.
news.summary:
Praj Industries' FY25 ROCE at 23%; 1,000 plants globally, presence in 100 countries.
Q3 FY26 order intake reached INR 9,140 Mn; total order book at INR 44,910 Mn.

news.title: Praj Industries targets INR 10,000 cr revenue by 2030 with INR 4,491 cr order backlog.
news.summary: Praj Industries targets INR 10,000 cr revenue by 2030 with INR 4,491 cr order backlog.

news.title:
Praj Industries expects double-digit EBITDA margins with a project mix shift to int'l engineering services.
High-value equipment exports are also expected to contribute to improved EBITDA margins.
news.summary:
Praj Industries expects double-digit EBITDA margins with a project mix shift to int'l engineering services.
High-value equipment exports are also expected to contribute to improved EBITDA margins.

news.title:
Praj Industries' Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹473M from ₹727.1M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 5.6% from 8.5% YoY, showing decreased profitability.
news.summary:
Praj Industries' Q3 EBITDA dropped to ₹473M from ₹727.1M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 5.6% from 8.5% YoY, showing decreased profitability.

news.title:
Praj Industries released unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
The company reported total income of Rs. 7,104.5M standalone and Rs. 8,473.7M consolidated, with exceptional items due to new labour codes.
news.summary:
Praj Industries released unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
The company reported total income of Rs. 7,104.5M standalone and Rs. 8,473.7M consolidated, with exceptional items due to new labour codes.

news.title:
Praj Industries to hold a board meeting on 12th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed until 14th Feb 2026, reopening on 16th Feb for directors and designated persons.
news.summary:
Praj Industries to hold a board meeting on 12th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed until 14th Feb 2026, reopening on 16th Feb for directors and designated persons.

news.title:
Praj Industries showcased Ethanol to Jet (EtJ) fuel tech at its R&D center.
The demo plant confirmed ethanol's conversion to SAF, aiding aviation's carbon reduction.
news.summary:
Praj Industries showcased Ethanol to Jet (EtJ) fuel tech at its R&D center.
The demo plant confirmed ethanol's conversion to SAF, aiding aviation's carbon reduction.

news.title:
Praj Industries disclosed an inter-se transfer of 72 lakh shares (3.9%) within its Promoter Group under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
The transfer does not affect the aggregate holding of the Promoter Group. SEBI filing fees of Rs. 1.5 lakh was paid.
news.summary:
Praj Industries disclosed an inter-se transfer of 72 lakh shares (3.9%) within its Promoter Group under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
The transfer does not affect the aggregate holding of the Promoter Group. SEBI filing fees of Rs. 1.5 lakh was paid.

news.title:
Praj Industries shares gained 18% in two days, closing at ₹357.8, despite being down 57.2% YTD, marking its steepest drop since 2008.
Analysts highlight diversification into CBG, bio bitumen, and SAF for medium-term growth, amid challenges in the BioEnergy segment and Q2FY26 profit drop.
news.summary:
Praj Industries shares gained 18% in two days, closing at ₹357.8, despite being down 57.2% YTD, marking its steepest drop since 2008.
Analysts highlight diversification into CBG, bio bitumen, and SAF for medium-term growth, amid challenges in the BioEnergy segment and Q2FY26 profit drop.

news.title:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.
news.summary:
Tech Mahindra saw 5.29x volume jump to 2.05L shares, stock fell 0.67% to ₹1564.9. Praj gained 5.2% to ₹352.5 on 4.05x volume rise.
Aegis dropped 1% to ₹743.3, Bharti Hexacom rose 2.2% to ₹1738, Chambal Fertilisers gained 3.4% to ₹451.4, all on volume surge.

news.title: Praj Industries shares surged 12%, despite facing its worst calendar year since 2008.
news.summary: Praj Industries shares surged 12%, despite facing its worst calendar year since 2008.

news.title:
Praj Industries reports inter se transfer of 72 lakh shares (3.9%) among promoters.
Post-transfer, promoter group holding rises to 24.9% with no change in total equity structure.
news.summary:
Praj Industries reports inter se transfer of 72 lakh shares (3.9%) among promoters.
Post-transfer, promoter group holding rises to 24.9% with no change in total equity structure.

news.title:
Praj Industries released a presentation on performance, strategic direction, with 23% ROCE by FY25.
Metrics include 16% EBITDA CAGR, 13% PAT CAGR; operations span 100 countries with 400 patents.
news.summary:
Praj Industries released a presentation on performance, strategic direction, with 23% ROCE by FY25.
Metrics include 16% EBITDA CAGR, 13% PAT CAGR; operations span 100 countries with 400 patents.

news.title:
Praj Industries Ltd, a leading biotech and engineering firm, shared its investor presentation. It focuses on bioenergy, high-purity water, and sustainable solutions.
With a global presence in 100+ countries, Praj operates 5 manufacturing facilities and holds 400 patents. The company is net debt-free with 11% revenue CAGR over 3 years.
news.summary:
Praj Industries Ltd, a leading biotech and engineering firm, shared its investor presentation. It focuses on bioenergy, high-purity water, and sustainable solutions.
With a global presence in 100+ countries, Praj operates 5 manufacturing facilities and holds 400 patents. The company is net debt-free with 11% revenue CAGR over 3 years.

news.title:
Praj Industries fell 2.1% to 322.7 on Nov 25, down 6.85.
The drop continues due to weak financial results and underperformance.
news.summary:
Praj Industries fell 2.1% to 322.7 on Nov 25, down 6.85.
The drop continues due to weak financial results and underperformance.

news.title:
Praj Industries hits 52-week low at Rs. 326.4, underperforming sector trends.
Despite weak profit, Praj maintains low debt and strong long-term sales growth.
news.summary:
Praj Industries hits 52-week low at Rs. 326.4, underperforming sector trends.
Despite weak profit, Praj maintains low debt and strong long-term sales growth.

news.title:
Praj Industries hosted an earnings call discussing Q2 and H1 FY26 results, highlighting revenue and profit decline due to challenges in ethanol and GenX segments.
The company shared updates on bioenergy, CBG, SAF, and engineering, pivoting strategies for GenX while exploring opportunities in sustainable aviation fuel, ZLD, and diesel blending.
news.summary:
Praj Industries hosted an earnings call discussing Q2 and H1 FY26 results, highlighting revenue and profit decline due to challenges in ethanol and GenX segments.
The company shared updates on bioenergy, CBG, SAF, and engineering, pivoting strategies for GenX while exploring opportunities in sustainable aviation fuel, ZLD, and diesel blending.

news.title:
Praj Industries to host investor delegation meet on 11th Nov 2025 at Pune office.
Organized by UBS Securities; no unpublished price-sensitive info will be discussed.
news.summary:
